Codex HSOG student bundle

Contents
- codex-hsog.exe
- start-codex-hsog.ps1

Quick start
1. Open PowerShell in this folder.
2. Run: .\start-codex-hsog.ps1
3. Enter your HSOG API key when prompted.

Notes
- The launcher only sets the HSOG provider for this run.
- If HSOG_API_KEY is already set in PowerShell, the launcher reuses it.
- You can pass normal Codex arguments to the launcher, for example:
  .\start-codex-hsog.ps1 --help
